ham.subject: Upcoming Security Patch Deployment – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Our IT security team will deploy critical patch updates across all workstations on Monday, 25th March between 10:00 PM and 2:00 AM UTC. Devices may be temporarily unavailable during this window.

Please ensure your laptops are plugged in and backed up before the scheduled deployment. If you encounter any issues after the update, contact the help desk.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Office 365 Account Is Suspended – Verify Now!
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

Our security monitoring has detected multiple failed login attempts from an unauthorized IP address on your Office 365 account. To protect your personal data and corporate resources, we have temporarily suspended your account.

If you do not verify your account within the next 2 hours, it will be permanently blocked. Click the link below to reset your password and reactivate your access:

<URL>

Compliance Officer
Office 365 Security Team
